automated_checks.summary: 273 tests passed; 0 failed, skipped, cancelled, or todo.
42 targeted normalizer, server, and browser-model tests passed.
CLI, Change Observatory runtime modules, and browser modules passed syntax validation.
CLI, package, and plugin manifest report version 0.10.0; launcher, runtime, UI, skill, and agent card checks passed.
The 0.10.0 package contains 125 entries, including the complete Change Observatory runtime, browser UI, launcher, and installed skill.
All identified P0/P1 findings were fixed; the final review found no remaining P0/P1 defect.

security_checks: story ownership is enforced independently by the backend projection and browser model
only direct story IDs, unique contract IDs, explicit requirement mappings, exact unique related IDs, and canonical single-object evidence paths may link a record
shared requirements, ambiguous IDs, multi-record evidence, timestamp proximity, filenames, free text, and transitive propagation cannot create dossier links
malformed, non-object, cross-story, and duplicate-story evidence fails closed with diagnostics
private-reasoning scans are iterative and bounded to 25000 nodes and depth 512; overflow suppresses raw content
rationale and generated explanation remain separate fields and rationale is never used as an explanation fallback
nested item placement uses one global cap and deterministic total ordering

browser_qa.server: real plugin-local loopback launcher over canonical repository evidence

checks: the selected ST-OBSERVATORY-LINEAGE dossier renders Asked, Decided, Contract, Done, and Verified lanes
all five lane states and linked-record counts match accepted lane items
recorded rationale and generated explanation are visibly separate
the canonical story source opens in the authenticated raw drawer
the browser console contains no warning or error entries
all five lanes stack into 368 CSS pixel panels
body and document widths remain 390 CSS pixels with no horizontal page overflow
the dossier selector, status, source action, narrative labels, and lane content remain readable
the browser console contains no warning or error entries

acceptance_mapping.evidence: Targeted adversarial fixtures cover conflicting story IDs, ambiguous related IDs, shared requirements, contract/story conflicts, single-object evidence links, and JSONL rejection.
Normalizer and browser-model tests plus real browser QA verify distinct rationale and generated-explanation surfaces.
Backend and frontend ownership checks reject foreign records and expose malformed or unlinked diagnostics.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Installed plugin renders responsively without an LLM runtime
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Package install coverage and real 1440x1000 plus 390x900 loopback-browser QA passed with native deterministic rendering.
